thinking:
**Refining The Plan**

I'm zeroing in on the cleanest way to integrate these changes. My latest approach utilizes `replace_file_content` to streamline the phone's display. My goal is to add the DISC buttons above the action buttons container. I am looking to target line 2608-2615. I'm writing out the clean code to make sure it will be optimized.


**Analyzing DISC Data**

I'm now focusing on how the DISC test data is handled and displayed. I've broken down the code that determines the test's status (NONE, PENDING, or COMPLETED) and the corresponding UI elements. This will inform placement and display of the status buttons. I'm taking a close look at the data structure to calculate the scores.
